title: Litematica-Printer-Easyplace-Extension
description:
This is Litematica Printer, but it tweaks easyPlaceMode instead of offering separate printing mode options.

The main purpose of this printer is building most of the redstone contraption safely, without activating it.
body:
**This is litematica printer (easyPlace extension), which tweaks EasyPlace behavior!**


**Printer requires Litematica, Malilib, Fabric API to operate.**

Printer tries to follow the most recent version of each releases.



Basically, printer will only work when you see the placement, and uses EasyPlace.

You can use `easyPlaceToggle` and `easyPlaceUseKey` to use litematica's EasyPlace feature.

If you want hand-free activation, you can set `easyPlaceUseKey` to None, and enable `Allow Empty Keybinds` by advanced setting.



This printer offers several complicated macro actions, such as Bedrock Breaking, Inventory Matching, Clearing Fluids / Snow, etc, but its not guaranteed to work! 


The main feature is 'Accurate Redstone Contraption Placement'. This means, printer will avoid placing block that will activate redstone contraptions. 

## Sample gif

![ezgif-1-345002d388](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/35677394/226923559-23c4c301-ba10-418e-aadd-897796d90bcd.gif)

Most of the features are documented in [ReadMe](https://github.com/aria1th/litematica-printer#readme).



`printerOff` - Disables Extension and use normal EasyPlace feature instead.

`easyPlaceMode++` - Disables Area Printing option and use `Fake Rotation` instead.

`printerModeFakeRotation` - Uses Fake Rotation to place block correctly.

`printerAccurateBlockPlacement` - If Carpet Extra's AccurateBlockPlacement is enabled, you can try this.
